verses.2: Bali allatheena kafaroo fee AAizzatin washiqaqin
verses.3: Kam ahlakna min qablihim min qarnin fanadaw walata heena manasin
verses.4: WaAAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum waqala alkafiroona hatha sahirun kaththabun
verses.5: AjaAAala alalihata ilahan wahidan inna hatha lashayon AAujabun
verses.6: Waintalaqa almalao minhum ani imshoo waisbiroo AAala alihatikum inna hatha lashayon yuradu
verses.7: Ma samiAAna bihatha fee almillati alakhirati in hatha illa ikhtilaqun
verses.8: Aonzila AAalayhi alththikru min baynina bal hum fee shakkin min thikree bal lamma yathooqoo AAathabi
verses.9: Am AAindahum khazainu rahmati rabbika alAAazeezi alwahhabi
verses.10: Am lahum mulku alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma falyartaqoo fee alasbabi
verses.11: Jundun ma hunalika mahzoomun mina alahzabi
verses.12: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waAAadun wafirAAawnu thoo alawtadi
verses.13: Wathamoodu waqawmu lootin waashabu alaykati olaika alahzabu
verses.14: In kullun illa kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa AAiqabi
verses.15: Wama yanthuru haolai illa sayhatan wahidatan ma laha min fawaqin
verses.16: Waqaloo rabbana AAajjil lana qittana qabla yawmi alhisabi
verses.17: Isbir AAala ma yaqooloona waothkur AAabdana dawooda tha alaydi innahu awwabun
verses.18: Inna sakhkharna aljibala maAAahu yusabbihna bialAAashiyyi waalishraqi
verses.20: Washadadna mulkahu waataynahu alhikmata wafasla alkhitabi
verses.21: Wahal ataka nabao alkhasmi ith tasawwaroo almihraba
verses.22: Ith dakhaloo AAala dawooda fafaziAAa minhum qaloo la takhaf khasmani bagha baAAduna AAala baAAdin faohkum baynana bialhaqqi wala tushtit waihdina ila sawai alssirati
verses.23: Inna hatha akhee lahu tisAAun watisAAoona naAAjatan waliya naAAjatun wahidatun faqala akfilneeha waAAazzanee fee alkhitabi
verses.24: Qala laqad thalamaka bisuali naAAjatika ila niAAajihi wainna katheeran mina alkhulatai layabghee baAAduhum AAala baAAdin illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati waqaleelun ma hum wathanna dawoodu annama fatannahu faistaghfara rabbahu wakharra rakiAAan waanaba
verses.25: Faghafarna lahu thalika wainna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maabin
verses.26: Ya dawoodu inna jaAAalnaka khaleefatan fee alardi faohkum bayna alnnasi bialhaqqi wala tattabiAAi alhawa fayudillaka AAan sabeeli Allahi inna allatheena yadilloona AAan sabeeli Allahi lahum AAathabun shadeedun bima nasoo yawma alhisabi
verses.27: Wama khalaqna alssamaa waalarda wama baynahuma batilan thalika thannu allatheena kafaroo fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo mina alnnari
verses.28: Am najAAalu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati kaalmufsideena fee alardi am najAAalu almuttaqeena kaalfujjari
verses.29: Kitabun anzalnahu ilayka mubarakun liyaddabbaroo ayatihi waliyatathakkara oloo alalbabi
verses.30: Wawahabna lidawooda sulaymana niAAma alAAabdu innahu awwabun
verses.31: Ith AAurida AAalayhi bialAAashiyyi alssafinatu aljiyadu
verses.32: Faqala innee ahbabtu hubba alkhayri AAan thikri rabbee hatta tawarat bialhijabi
verses.33: Ruddooha AAalayya fatafiqa mashan bialssooqi waalaAAnaqi
verses.34: Walaqad fatanna sulaymana waalqayna AAala kursiyyihi jasadan thumma anaba
verses.35: Qala rabbi ighfir lee wahab lee mulkan la yanbaghee liahadin min baAAdee innaka anta alwahhabu
verses.36: Fasakhkharna lahu alrreeha tajree biamrihi rukhaan haythu asaba
verses.39: Hatha AAataona faomnun aw amsik bighayri hisabin
verses.40: Wainna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maabin
verses.41: Waothkur AAabdana ayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya alshshaytanu binusbin waAAathabin
verses.42: Orkud birijlika hatha mughtasalun baridun washarabun
verses.43: Wawahabna lahu ahlahu wamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan minna wathikra liolee alalbabi
verses.44: Wakhuth biyadika dighthan faidrib bihi wala tahnath inna wajadnahu sabiran niAAma alAAabdu innahu awwabun
verses.45: Waothkur AAibadana ibraheema waishaqa wayaAAqooba olee alaydee waalabsari
verses.48: Waothkur ismaAAeela wailyasaAAa watha alkifli wakullun mina alakhyari
verses.49: Hatha thikrun wainna lilmuttaqeena lahusna maabin
verses.51: Muttakieena feeha yadAAoona feeha bifakihatin katheeratin washarabin
verses.54: Inna hatha larizquna ma lahu min nafadin
verses.59: Hatha fawjun muqtahimun maAAakum la marhaban bihim innahum saloo alnnari
verses.60: Qaloo bal antum la marhaban bikum antum qaddamtumoohu lana fabisa alqararu
verses.61: Qaloo rabbana man qaddama lana hatha fazidhu AAathaban diAAfan fee alnnari
verses.62: Waqaloo ma lana la nara rijalan kunna naAAudduhum mina alashrari
verses.63: Attakhathnahum sikhriyyan am zaghat AAanhumu alabsaru
verses.64: Inna thalika lahaqqun takhasumu ahli alnnari
verses.65: Qul innama ana munthirun wama min ilahin illa Allahu alwahidu alqahharu
verses.66: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma alAAazeezu alghaffaru
verses.69: Ma kana liya min AAilmin bialmalai alaAAla ith yakhtasimoona
verses.70: In yooha ilayya illa annama ana natheerun mubeenun
verses.71: Ith qala rabbuka lilmalaikati innee khaliqun basharan min teenin
verses.72: Faitha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehi min roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideena
verses.74: Illa ibleesa istakbara wakana mina alkafireena
verses.75: Qala ya ibleesu ma manaAAaka an tasjuda lima khalaqtu biyadayya astakbarta am kunta mina alAAaleena
verses.76: Qala ana khayrun minhu khalaqtanee min narin wakhalaqtahu min teenin
verses.78: Wainna AAalayka laAAnatee ila yawmi alddeeni
verses.79: Qala rabbi faanthirnee ila yawmi yubAAathoona
verses.85: Laamlaanna jahannama minka wamimman tabiAAaka minhum ajmaAAeena
verses.86: Qul ma asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin wama ana mina almutakallifeena
